task_completion.description: Agent logs into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus and navigates to the Contracts module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface with the user logged in, and the 'Contracts' tab or 'New Contract' form is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the Contract Name, Vendor Name, and Contract Number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Contract' form shows 'Cisco SmartNet Support - Core Switches FY2025' in the Contract Name field, 'Cisco Systems' selected or entered in the Vendor field, and 'CSC-2025-AMC-00471' in the Contract Number field.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the Support Type and Cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows '24x7' selected for Support Type and '24750' entered in the Cost field.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the Start Date and Expiry Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows 'Jan 15, 2025' (or equivalent format like 2025-01-15) in the Start Date field and 'Jan 14, 2026' (or 2026-01-14) in the Expiry Date field.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the required description text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains the text starting with 'Annual maintenance and technical support contract covering all Cisco Catalyst 9300...'.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saves the new contract.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the screen transitions to the saved contract details view showing the newly created 'Cisco SmartNet Support - Core Switches FY2025' contract.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus GUI, not a text editor or mockup.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, API requests, or direct database SQL injections to create the contract.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the correct form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is typed into the specific input fields of the 'New Contract' form, rather than being pasted into a single unrelated text box or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
